9. ~~romance(basque) [negated conjecture 8]
10. romance(basque) [flattening 9]
12. ! [X0,X1] : (related(X0,X1) | (~romance(X0) | ~romance(X1))) [ennf transformation 2]
13. ! [X0,X1] : (related(X0,X1) | ~romance(X0) | ~romance(X1)) [flattening 12]
14. ! [X0] : (X0 = basque | ~related(basque,X0)) [ennf transformation 6]
15. related(X0,X1) | ~romance(X0) | ~romance(X1) [cnf transformation 13]
17. romance(spanish) [cnf transformation 4]
19. ~related(basque,X0) | basque = X0 [cnf transformation 14]
21. spanish != basque [cnf transformation 7]
26. romance(basque) [cnf transformation 10]
27. ~romance(basque) | ~romance(X0) | basque = X0 [resolution 15,19]
28. ~romance(X0) | basque = X0 [forward subsumption resolution 27,26]
31. spanish = basque [resolution 28,17]
32. $false [forward subsumption resolution 31,21]
